back_translation: A psalm of David. O LORD, who may dwell in Your tent? Who may abide on Your holy mountain?
He who walks blamelessly and does righteousness, and speaks truth from his heart;
who does not slander with his tongue, does no harm to his neighbor, and casts no reproach on his friend;
in whose eyes a vile person is despised, but who honors those who fear the LORD; who swears to his own hurt and does not change;
who does not lend his money at interest, and takes no bribe against the innocent. He who does these things will never be shaken.
